escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with Russia's largest aerial assault on Kyiv killing 24, ongoing US-Iran war, and Israel-Lebanon escalation.

ticker_items: Russia launches largest aerial assault since war began, kills 24 in Kyiv
US-Iran war escalates with ship seizures in Strait of Hormuz
Israeli strikes wound 37 in Lebanon as Washington talks continue
Ukraine disrupts Russian supply lines, slowing eastern advance
USS Gerald R. Ford ends record 326-day deployment Saturday

eastern_europe.description: Massive missile and drone attack involving 675 drones and 56 missiles kills at least 24 civilians
Ukrainian drones strike Russian city killing four civilians
Russian forces hit apartment building killing at least 24 people.
Russian aerial assault described as largest since war began kills 24 civilians

middle_east.description: Hezbollah mortar fire kills one Israeli soldier near Litani River
Hezbollah mortar fire kills Israeli soldier operating in Lebanon.
Israeli strikes wound at least 37 people in southern Lebanon
Hezbollah mortar fire kills Israeli soldier near Litani River

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

ukraine.text: Ukraine's air force says the attack on Thursday was part of the largest aerial assault since the war began
ukraine.speaker: Ukrainian Air Force
ukraine.title: Official statement

middle_east.text: The Chinese president warned of possible conflict if the issue of Taiwan is 'handled poorly'
middle_east.speaker: Xi Jinping
middle_east.title: Chinese President

middle_east.text: Iran has 'no trust' in US, will negotiate only if it is serious
middle_east.speaker: Araqchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Official

middle_east.text: Recovering Iran's enriched uranium is more for public relations, but added it should still be removed
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Xi Jinping meets Trump in Beijing for first US state visit to China in nine years. Both leaders agree Iran cannot have nuclear weapons and discuss keeping Strait of Hormuz open. Putin reportedly watching nervously as US-China relations potentially stabilize.

Reports confirm Saudi Arabia conducted multiple unpublicized airstrikes on Iran in late March 2026 as retaliation for earlier attacks during Operation Epic Fury. Saudi Arabia also proposing non-aggression pact with Iran based on Helsinki Accords model.

Poland scrambled fighter jets as Russian drone strikes approached NATO airspace during massive attack on Ukraine. Air defenses placed on highest alert as nearly 400 Russian drones launched across Ukrainian territory.

Finnish defense forces scrambled fighter jets amid drone alerts near Russian border. Officials later confirmed no stray drones detected in Finnish airspace. Defense chief warns of continued alarms as Russian war persists.

UAE rejects Iran's attempts to justify terrorist attacks after Tehran accused Abu Dhabi of being active partner in US military campaign. Reports indicate UAE failed to convince other GCC states to join coordinated military campaign against Iran.

Turkey proposes building $1.2 billion military fuel pipeline to help meet energy needs of NATO allies on eastern European flank. Initiative aimed at supporting alliance infrastructure amid regional tensions.

German Chancellor Friedrich Merz states he would not advise his children to go to US, no longer seeing it as land of opportunity. Comments reflect growing European concerns about US security guarantees.

financial.notes: Russia's economy posts first quarterly decline in three years due to war strain and sanctions.

update_log.text: Russia launches largest aerial assault on Kyiv since war began, killing 24
Israeli strikes wound 37 in southern Lebanon as Washington peace talks continue
Ukraine disrupts Russian supply lines, slowing advance in eastern regions
USS Gerald R. Ford to end record 326-day deployment Saturday
Russian strike on Kyiv apartment building kills at least 24 civilians, Trump calls it setback to peace efforts.
Israeli soldier killed by Hezbollah mortar fire near Litani River in Lebanon despite ceasefire.
Finland ends drone alert after scrambling fighter jets, no drones detected in airspace.
Iran continues seizing ships in Strait of Hormuz as China opposes UN resolution on waterway.
Russia launches massive 675-drone, 56-missile attack on Kyiv killing at least 24 civilians
Saudi Arabia confirmed to have conducted unpublicized March airstrikes on Iran in retaliation
Israeli soldier killed by Hezbollah mortar fire near Litani River in Lebanon
Trump-Xi summit in Beijing produces agreement that Iran cannot have nuclear weapons
Russia and Ukraine exchange 205 prisoners of war each in latest swap
